description_long: This is an elegant, tall vase with a slender neck and a wide, rounded body, tapering to a small base. The surface is adorned with intricate Art Nouveau-style floral motifs, featuring large white and red flowers, green leaves, and stylized organic lines. The background is a deep, glossy black, which contrasts beautifully with the vibrant colors of the decorative elements. The rim and base are highlighted with a metallic gold finish, adding a touch of luxury and refinement. The vase appears to be made of glazed ceramic or porcelain, giving it a smooth, reflective surface. Its overall appearance suggests it is a decorative piece, likely intended for display in a refined urban setting such as a public building, upscale park, or cultural venue.
description: A tall, glossy black vase with gold accents and ornate Art Nouveau floral motifs in red, white, and green. The surface is smooth and highly decorative, ideal for elegant urban display.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main floral motif with a prominent white flower and gold-accented rim and base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the continuation of the floral pattern, with more green leaves and less of the central white flower visible.
description_view_2: Another front-angled view, emphasizing the same main motif as view 0 but with a slightly different lighting on the gold rim.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, showing the floral design wrapping around the vase and the gold accents.
